description: v0.2.9 — Adapt to @blxzer/smart-search 0.1.15: research flags, structured citations in evidence manifests, bundled skill sync for non-Cursor platforms.
changelog:
**@blxzer/cursor-trellis 0.2.9 / @blxzer/cursor-trellis-core 0.2.9**

### Added
- feat(retrieval): `run_smart_search.py` passthrough for `--locale-scope`, `--dry-run`, `--progress` (deep-research)
- feat(retrieval): Trellis evidence manifest preserves `outputSchemaVersion`, structured citation fields, and `dryRun`

### Changed
- chore(deps): bump `@blxzer/smart-search` to `^0.1.15`
- docs: sync bundled `smart-search-cli` skill from smart-search v0.1.15 (`.agents/skills/` platforms only; Cursor stays commands-only)
- docs: retrieval-daily-guide documents smart-search 0.1.15 research flags and Cursor skill-surface policy

Run `trellis update` in each project.
notes: Cursor projects still use run_smart_search.py + rules — no new .cursor/skills/ entries.
